news.title: onsemi Expands Silicon Carbide Portfolio with New 1200V MOSFETs
news.summary: onsemi announces expansion of SiC MOSFET portfolio with new 1200V devices offering industry-leading RDS(on) and improved switching performance for EV charging and solar applications.
content: onsemi has announced the expansion of its Silicon Carbide (SiC) MOSFET portfolio with new 1200V devices designed for electric vehicle charging, solar inverters, and industrial power applications. The new devices feature industry-leading on-resistance and improved switching characteristics.
Key features of the new SiC MOSFETs include:
- Ultra-low RDS(on) down to 15mΩ at 1200V
- Improved switching performance with reduced switching losses
- Enhanced gate oxide reliability for long-term operation
- Kelvin source connection for optimized switching
- AEC-Q101 qualification for automotive applications

These new devices complement onsemi's existing SiC portfolio and provide designers with more options for high-efficiency power conversion applications. The improved performance enables higher power density and reduced system cost.
BeiLuo Electronics, as a core distributor of onsemi products, will have these new SiC MOSFETs available for sampling and production orders. Contact our sales team for availability and pricing.

news.title: onsemi Achieves IATF 16949 Certification for Additional Manufacturing Facilities
news.summary: onsemi announces IATF 16949 automotive quality management system certification for additional manufacturing facilities, strengthening supply chain for automotive semiconductor solutions.
content: onsemi has announced that additional manufacturing facilities have achieved IATF 16949 certification, the international standard for quality management systems in the automotive industry. This certification demonstrates onsemi's commitment to meeting the stringent quality requirements of automotive customers.
The newly certified facilities expand onsemi's capacity to produce automotive-qualified products including:
- IGBT modules for EV traction inverters
- Power MOSFETs for battery management systems
- Intelligent power modules for HVAC compressors
- Sensors for ADAS applications

IATF 16949 certification requires rigorous quality management processes, continuous improvement, and defect prevention. This certification gives automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers confidence in onsemi's ability to deliver high-quality, reliable products.
BeiLuo Electronics supports automotive customers with full PPAP documentation, traceability, and technical support for onsemi's automotive-qualified products.

news.title: onsemi Commits to Carbon Neutrality by 2040
news.summary: onsemi announces ambitious sustainability goals including carbon neutrality by 2040, reinforcing commitment to sustainable innovation and environmental responsibility.
content: onsemi has announced its commitment to achieve carbon neutrality by 2040, reinforcing its position as a leader in sustainable semiconductor manufacturing. This commitment aligns with onsemi's mission of enabling sustainable innovation through intelligent power and sensing technologies.
Key sustainability initiatives include:
- 100% renewable energy for manufacturing by 2030
- Carbon neutral operations by 2040
- Water conservation and recycling programs
- Waste reduction and circular economy initiatives
- Sustainable product design for energy efficiency

onsemi's products already enable significant carbon reduction in end applications. The company's power semiconductors help reduce energy consumption in industrial, automotive, and renewable energy systems, contributing to global decarbonization efforts.
As a core distributor, BeiLuo Electronics supports onsemi's sustainability mission by promoting energy-efficient solutions to our customers.

news.title: BeiLuo Electronics Strengthens Partnership with onsemi
news.summary: BeiLuo Electronics expands onsemi product inventory and technical support capabilities to better serve customers in industrial and automotive markets.
content: BeiLuo Electronics is pleased to announce the expansion of our partnership with onsemi, strengthening our position as a core distributor of onsemi products in the Asia-Pacific region. This expansion includes increased inventory investment and enhanced technical support capabilities.
Key enhancements to our onsemi support include:
- Expanded inventory of popular IGBT modules including FGY75T120SWD and FGY100T120SWD
- Increased stock of NTHL series MOSFETs for power supply applications
- Dedicated FAE team with specialized onsemi product training
- New evaluation boards and reference designs
- Enhanced local technical support in Shenzhen, Shanghai, and Hong Kong

These investments enable BeiLuo to provide faster delivery, better technical support, and more competitive pricing for onsemi products. Customers can now access onsemi's full portfolio of power semiconductors with local support and shorter lead times.
Contact our sales team to learn more about our expanded onsemi product offerings and support services.
